mapper.select: SELECT p.*, m.name as member_name FROM yw_auth_product p inner join member_user m on p.member_id=m.id WHERE p.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) and p.status='10' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM yw_article a WHERE a.spu_id = p.id and a.status='1' ) order by p.create_time desc
